input.description: CSV samplesheet with sample, fastq_1, fastq_2, read_layout, and optional assembly_group columns.

assembler.description: Assembler. Use megahit for Illumina and flye for Nanopore.

min_contig_len.description: Minimum contig length for assembly output.

genome_size.description: Estimated genome/metagenome size passed to Flye for Nanopore assembly.

trim_reads.description: Run HOMES native adapter and quality trimming before assembly.

min_read_quality.description: Minimum quality threshold for end trimming.

min_read_length.description: Minimum read length retained after trimming.

adapter_1.description: Optional adapter sequence to clip from fastq_1 reads.

adapter_2.description: Optional adapter sequence to clip from fastq_2 reads.

binner.description: Binning method. Use metabat2 for real runs or native for lightweight validation.

binning_min_contig_len.description: Minimum contig length used for binning.

skip_binning.description: Skip external binning and pass contigs forward as a pseudo-bin.

skip_functional_annotation.description: Skip functional gene annotation table generation.

server_queue.description: Optional server queue name used by server_slurm or server_pbs profiles.

server_cluster_options.description: Optional raw scheduler options passed through Nextflow.
